context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 198 verified Exception Queue feature. Key findings: (1) POST /api/readiness/retry-failed supports force_escalate query param (boolean) - when true, immediately moves all stuck docs to Exception Queue; when false (default), increments retry_count by 1 and escalates only when retry_count >= max_retries (4). (2) GET /api/readiness/exception-queue returns {total, documents} with pagination via skip/limit. (3) Exception status is correctly excluded from main Inbox queue view (documents endpoint with queue_view=true). (4) TERMINAL_STATUSES in documents.py and TERMINAL in readiness.py both include 'Exception' and 'exception'. Current state: 0 docs in exception queue, 0 docs in inbox, 27 total docs.
